notes: Eclipse Dominion World Championship qualifying rounds drove DAU to 1.8M (+50%) and CCU peak to 1.15M (2.74x baseline). Revenue surged to $14.1M on esports MTX bundles. However, APAC infrastructure buckled — Tokyo relay latency p50 hit 112ms (2.5x baseline), p99 at 340ms. SAI spiked to 82 on cascading autoscaler failures. Support tickets tripled to 9,600 (APAC matchmaking complaints dominated). ASM-0005 ('APAC infra headroom sufficient for 2x load') expired — actual load hit 2.8x. DRIFT-0012 flagged APAC capacity gap. DRIFT-0013 flagged esports bundle pricing inconsistency across regions. DRIFT-0014 flagged build pipeline saturation at peak. DLR-0031 ratified emergency APAC capacity expansion.
